brewmaster.description: A sturdy brawler who uses unpredictable movement and mystical brews to avoid damage and protect allies. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Polearm

nodes.name: Soothing Mist
nodes.description: Heals the target for 6,386 over 7.1 sec. While channeling, Enveloping Mist and Vivify may be cast instantly on the target.

nodes.name: Paralysis
nodes.description: Incapacitates the target for 1 min. Limit 1. Damage may cancel the effect.

nodes.name: Stagger
nodes.description: You shrug off attacks, delaying a portion of Physical damage based on your Agility, instead taking it over 10 sec. Affects magical attacks at 58% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Elusive Mists
nodes.description: Reduces all damage taken by you and your target while channeling Soothing Mists by 6%.

nodes.name: Tiger's Lust
nodes.description: Increases a friendly target's movement speed by 70% for 6 sec and removes all roots and snares.

choices.name: Crashing Momentum
choices.description: Targets you Roll through are snared by 40% for 5 sec.

choices.name: Disable
choices.description: Reduces the target's movement speed by 50% for 15 sec, duration refreshed by your melee attacks.

nodes.name: Fast Feet
nodes.description: Blackout Kick deals 20% increased damage. Spinning Crane Kick deals 10% additional damage.

nodes.name: Grace of the Crane
nodes.description: Increases all healing taken by 4%.

nodes.name: Bounding Agility
nodes.description: Roll and Chi Torpedo travel a small distance further.

nodes.name: Calming Presence
nodes.description: Reduces all damage taken by 3%.

nodes.name: Wind's Reach
nodes.description:
The range of Disable is increased by 5 yds.
 
The duration of Crashing Momentum is increased by 3 sec and its snare now reduces movement speed by an additional 20%.

nodes.name: Detox
nodes.description: Removes all Poison and Disease effects from the target.

nodes.name: Vivacious Vivification
nodes.description:
After casting Rising Sun Kick, your next Vivify becomes instant cast.

This effect also reduces the energy cost of Vivify by 75%.

nodes.name: Silent Sanctuary
nodes.description: While no enemies are within 15 yds, you heal for 1,140 every 3 sec.

nodes.name: Jade Walk
nodes.description: While out of combat, your movement speed is increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Pressure Points
nodes.description: Paralysis now removes all Enrage effects from its target.

nodes.name: Spear Hand Strike
nodes.description: Jabs the target in the throat, interrupting spellcasting and preventing any spell from that school of magic from being cast for 5 sec.

nodes.name: Reinvigoration
nodes.description: After Detox successfully removes an effect from an ally, their movement speed is increased by 30% for 5 sec.

nodes.name: Ancient Arts
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Paralysis by 8 sec and the cooldown of Leg Sweep by 5 sec.

choices.name: Chi Wave
choices.description: Every 15 sec, your next Rising Sun Kick or Vivify releases a wave of Chi energy that flows through friends and foes, dealing 7 Nature damage or 21 healing. Bounces up to 7 times to targets within 25 yards.

choices.name: Chi Burst
choices.description:
Hurls a torrent of Chi energy up to 40 yds forward, dealing 98 Nature damage to all enemies, and 77 healing to the Monk and all allies in its path. Healing and damage reduced beyond 5 targets.


Casting Chi Burst does not prevent avoiding attacks.

nodes.name: Transcendence
nodes.description: Split your body and spirit, leaving your spirit behind for 15 min. Use Transcendence: Transfer to swap locations with your spirit.

nodes.name: Energy Transfer
nodes.description: Successfully interrupting an enemy reduces the cooldown of Paralysis and Roll by 5 sec.

choices.name: Celerity
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Roll by 5 sec and increases its maximum number of charges by 1.

choices.name: Chi Torpedo
choices.description: Torpedoes you forward a long distance and increases your movement speed by 30% for 10 sec, stacking up to 2 times.

nodes.name: Stillstep Coil
nodes.description: Leg Sweep applies Disable for 5.0 sec when it ends.

choices.name: Quick Footed
choices.description: The duration of snare effects on you is reduced by 20%.

choices.name: Hasty Provocation
choices.description: Provoked targets move towards you at 50% increased speed.

nodes.name: Ferocity of Xuen
nodes.description: Increases all damage dealt by 2%.

choices.name: Ring of Peace
choices.description: Form a Ring of Peace at the target location for 5 sec. Enemies that enter will be ejected from the Ring.

choices.name: Song of Chi-Ji
choices.description: Conjures a cloud of hypnotic mist that slowly travels forward. Enemies touched by the mist fall asleep, Disoriented for 20 sec.

nodes.name: Spirit's Essence
nodes.description: Transcendence: Transfer snares targets within 10 yds by 70% for 4 sec when cast.

nodes.name: Tiger Tail Sweep
nodes.description: Increases the range of Leg Sweep by 4 yds.

nodes.name: Improved Touch of Death
nodes.description: Touch of Death can now be used on targets with less than 15% health remaining, dealing 35% of your maximum health in damage.

nodes.name: Vigorous Expulsion
nodes.description: Expel Harm's healing increased by 5% and critical strike chance increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Yu'lon's Grace
nodes.description: Find resilience in the flow of chi in battle, gaining a magic absorb shield for 1.0% of your max health every 3 sec in combat, stacking up to 10%.

nodes.name: Peace and Prosperity
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Ring of Peace by 5 sec and Song of Chi-Ji's cast time is reduced by 0.5 sec.

nodes.name: Fortifying Brew
nodes.description: Turns your skin to stone for 15 sec.

nodes.name: Dance of the Wind
nodes.description: Your dodge chance is increased by 5%.

nodes.name: Save Them All
nodes.description: Your healing is increased by up to 10%, based on the current health of your target. Lower health targets are healed for more.

nodes.name: Swift Art
nodes.description: Roll removes a snare effect once every 30 sec.

choices.name: Strength of Spirit
choices.description: Expel Harm's healing is increased by up to 100%, based on your missing health.

choices.name: Profound Rebuttal
choices.description: Expel Harm's critical healing is increased by 50%.

nodes.name: Summon Black Ox Statue
nodes.description:
Summons a Black Ox Statue at the target location for 15 min, pulsing threat to all enemies within 20 yards.

You may cast Provoke on the statue to taunt all enemies near the statue.

choices.name: Ironshell Brew
choices.description: Increases your maximum health by an additional 10% and your damage taken is reduced by an additional 10% while Fortifying Brew is active.

choices.name: Expeditious Fortification
choices.description: Fortifying Brew cooldown reduced by 30 sec.

nodes.name: Diffuse Magic
nodes.description: Activating Fortifying Brew transfers all currently active harmful magical effects on you back to their original caster if possible.

nodes.name: Celestial Determination
nodes.description: While your Celestial is active, you cannot be slowed below 90% normal movement speed.

nodes.name: Chi Proficiency
nodes.description: Magical damage done increased by 2% and healing done increased by 2%.

nodes.name: Healing Winds
nodes.description: Transcendence: Transfer immediately heals you for 10% of your maximum health.

nodes.name: Windwalking
nodes.description: You and your allies within 10 yards have 4% increased movement speed. Stacks with other similar effects.

nodes.name: Chi Transfer
nodes.description: Touch of Death now heals you for 50% of its damage done.

nodes.name: Martial Instincts
nodes.description: Increases your Physical damage done by 2% and Avoidance increased by 2%.

nodes.name: Lighter Than Air
nodes.description: Roll causes you to become lighter than air, allowing you to double jump to dash forward a short distance once within 5 sec, but the cooldown of Roll is increased by 2 sec.

nodes.name: Flow of Chi
nodes.description:
You gain a bonus effect based on your current health.

Above 90% health: Movement speed increased by 5%. This bonus stacks with similar effects.

Between 90% and 35% health: Damage taken reduced by 5%.

Below 35% health: Healing received increased by 10%.

choices.name: Escape from Reality
choices.description: After you use Transcendence: Transfer, you can use Transcendence: Transfer again within 10 sec, ignoring its cooldown.

choices.name: Transcendence: Linked Spirits
choices.description: Transcendence now tethers your spirit onto an ally for 1 hour. Use Transcendence: Transfer to teleport to your ally's location.

nodes.name: Fatal Touch
nodes.description: Touch of Death's cooldown is reduced by 90 sec.

nodes.name: Rushing Reflexes
nodes.description: Your heightened reflexes allow you to react swiftly to the presence of enemies, causing you to quickly lunge to the nearest enemy in front of you within 10 yards after you Roll.

nodes.name: Keg Smash
nodes.description: Smash a keg of brew, dealing 100 Physical damage to your primary target and 67 Physical damage to all other enemies within 8 yds, and reducing their movement speed by 20% for 15 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

nodes.name: Purifying Brew
nodes.description: Clears 50% of your Staggered damage, or a minimum of 8% of your maximum health.

nodes.name: Shuffle
nodes.description:
Niuzao's teachings allow you to shuffle during combat, increasing the effectiveness of your Stagger by 100%.

Shuffle is granted by attacking enemies with your Keg Smash, Blackout Kick, and Spinning Crane Kick.

 Stagger: You shrug off attacks, delaying a portion of Physical damage based on your Agility, instead taking it over 10 sec. Affects magical attacks at 58% effectiveness.

nodes.name: August Blessing
nodes.description: When you would be healed above maximum health, you instead convert an amount equal to 40% of your critical strike chance to a heal over time effect.

choices.name: Staggering Strikes
choices.description: When you Blackout Kick, your Stagger is reduced by 210, increased by up to 200% based on your missing health.

choices.name: Quick Sip
choices.description: Purify 5% of your Staggered damage each time you gain 3 sec of Shuffle duration.

nodes.name: Elixir of Determination
nodes.description: When you fall below 40% health, you gain an absorb for 30% of your recently Purified damage, or a minimum of 8% of your maximum health. Cannot occur more than once every 15 sec.

nodes.name: Improved Blackout Kick
nodes.description: Blackout Kick deals 20% increased damage.

nodes.name: Swift as a Coursing River
nodes.description: Drinking from a Brew increases your movement speed by 15% and your auto-attack speed by 10% for 15 sec.

nodes.name: Gift of the Ox
nodes.description:
When you take damage, you have a chance to summon a Healing Sphere.

Healing Sphere:
Summon a Healing Sphere visible only to you. Moving through this Healing Sphere heals you for 118.

choices.name: Special Delivery
choices.description: Drinking from your Brews has a 100% chance to toss a keg high into the air that lands nearby after 3 sec, dealing 34 Physical damage to all enemies within 8 yards and reducing their movement speed by 50% for 15 sec.

choices.name: Rushing Jade Wind
choices.description: Summons a whirling tornado around you, causing 42 Physical damage over 5.4 sec to all enemies within 8 yards. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

nodes.name: Spirit of the Ox
nodes.description:
Blackout Kick has a chance to summon a Healing Sphere.

Healing Sphere:
Summon a Healing Sphere visible only to you. Moving through this Healing Sphere heals you for 112.

nodes.name: Jade Flash
nodes.description: Crackling Jade Lightning deals its damage in 75% less time, costs 75% less Energy, and strikes 4 additional targets, but has a 60 sec cooldown.

choices.name: Celestial Brew
choices.description: A swig of strong brew that coalesces purified chi escaping your body into a celestial guard, absorbing 793 damage.

choices.name: Celestial Infusion
choices.description: A strong herbal brew that coalesces purified chi escaping your body into a celestial guard, absorbing 30% of incoming damage, up to 794 total.

nodes.name: Niuzao's Resolve
nodes.description: Healing Spheres now heal over 10 sec, and their healing is increased by up to 80% based on your missing health.

nodes.name: Celestial Flames
nodes.description:
Drinking from Brews has a 30% chance to coat you with Celestial Flames for 6 sec. While Celestial Flames is active:

 Special Delivery:
Kegs thrown by Special Delivery are ignited and splash upon landing, dealing 35 Fire damage to up to 5 nearby enemies.

 Rushing Jade Wind:
Rushing Jade Wind becomes a firestorm, increasing its radius by 30% and causing it to deal Fire damage.

choices.name: Shadowboxing Treads
choices.description: Blackout Kick's damage increased by 20% and it strikes an additional 2 targets.

choices.name: Fluidity of Motion
choices.description: Blackout Kick's cooldown is reduced by 1 sec.

nodes.name: Elusive Footwork
nodes.description: Blackout Kick deals an additional 5% damage. Blackout Kick critical hits grant an additional 1 stack of Elusive Brawler.

nodes.name: One With the Wind
nodes.description: You have a 10% chance to not reset your Elusive Brawler stacks after a successful dodge.

nodes.name: Breath of Fire
nodes.description:
Breathe fire on targets in front of you, causing 35 Fire damage. Deals reduced damage to secondary targets.

Targets affected by Keg Smash will also burn, taking 23 Fire damage and dealing 5% reduced damage to you for 12 sec.

nodes.name: Gai Plin's Imperial Brew
nodes.description: Purifying Brew instantly heals you for 25% of the Staggered damage it clears.

choices.name: Light Brewing
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Purifying Brew, Celestial Brew, and Celestial Infusion by 20%.

choices.name: Training of Niuzao
choices.description: Gain up to 15% Mastery based on your current level of Stagger.

nodes.name: Pretense of Instability
nodes.description: Drinking a Brew grants you 10% dodge for 5 sec.

choices.name: Scalding Brew
choices.description: Keg Smash deals an additional 20% damage to targets affected by Breath of Fire.

choices.name: Sal'salabim's Strength
choices.description: When you use Keg Smash, the remaining cooldown on Breath of Fire is reset.

nodes.name: Fortifying Brew: Determination
nodes.description:
Fortifying Brew increases Stagger effectiveness by 15% while active.

Combines with other Fortifying Brew effects.

choices.name: Bob and Weave
choices.description: Increases the duration of Stagger by 5.0 sec, causing Staggered damage to be dealt to you more gradually.

choices.name: Black Ox Brew
choices.description: Chug some Black Ox Brew, which instantly refills your Energy, Purifying Brew charges, and grants one charge of Celestial Brew or Celestial Infusion.

nodes.name: Walk with the Ox
nodes.description: Your damaging abilities have a chance to invoke Niuzao, causing him to charge to your target's location and Stomp, dealing 141 Physical damage to your target and reduced damage to secondary targets.

nodes.name: Zen State
nodes.description: The effectiveness of your Stagger is increased by up to 15%, based on your missing health.

nodes.name: Tranquil Spirit
nodes.description: When you consume a Healing Sphere, you clear 5% of your currently Staggered damage.

nodes.name: Face Palm
nodes.description: Tiger Palm's damage is increased by 100% and reduces the remaining cooldown of your Brews by 0.5 additional sec.

choices.name: Dragonfire Brew
choices.description: Breath of Fire deals 100% increased damage, and after using Breath of Fire, you breathe fire 2 additional times, each dealing 7 Fire damage.

choices.name: Charred Passions
choices.description: Your Breath of Fire ignites your right leg in flame for 8 sec, causing your Blackout Kick and Spinning Crane Kick to deal 50% additional damage as Fire damage and refresh the duration of your Breath of Fire on the target.

nodes.name: High Tolerance
nodes.description:
Stagger is 2% more effective at delaying damage.

Purifying Brew refunds 2.0 sec of its cooldown if cast at Elevated Stagger.

choices.name: Press the Advantage
choices.description:
Your main hand auto attacks reduce the cooldown on your Brews by 0.50 sec and block your target's chi, dealing 10 additional Nature damage.

After 10 attacks, the next casts Tiger Palm at 100% effectiveness.

choices.name: Blackout Combo
choices.description:
Blackout Kick also empowers your next ability:

 Tiger Palm: Damage increased by 100%.

 Keg Smash: Reduces the remaining cooldown on your Brews by 2 additional sec.

nodes.name: Anvil and Stave
nodes.description: Each time you dodge or an enemy misses you, the remaining cooldown on your Brews is reduced by 0.5 sec. Effect reduced by 50% for each additional recent attacker, up to 5.

nodes.name: Counterstrike
nodes.description: Each time you dodge or an enemy misses you, your next Tiger Palm or Spinning Crane Kick deals 100% increased damage.

nodes.name: Exploding Keg
nodes.description:
Hurls a flaming keg at the target location, dealing 133 Fire damage to nearby enemies, causing your attacks against them to deal 10 additional Fire damage, and causing their melee attacks to deal 100% reduced damage for the next 3 sec.

Resets the cooldown of Keg Smash.

nodes.name: Ox Stance
nodes.description: Casting Purifying Brew grants a charge of Ox Stance. When you take damage that is greater than 60% of your current health, a charge is consumed to increase the amount you Stagger.

choices.name: Awakening Spirit
choices.description:
Purifying Brew also surrounds you with protective energies for 15 sec. 

When Staggered damage would be dealt to you, you instead absorb up to 50%, until 210 has been prevented.

choices.name: Vital Flame
choices.description: Heal for 40% of all Fire or Nature damage dealt by your spells and abilities.

nodes.name: Invoke Niuzao, the Black Ox
nodes.description:
Summons an effigy of Niuzao, the Black Ox for 25 sec that attacks your primary target and Stomps when you cast Blackout Kick, damaging all nearby enemies.

While active, 40% of damage delayed by Stagger is instead Staggered by Niuzao, and Niuzao is healed for 100% of your purified Stagger.

nodes.name: Fuel on the Fire
nodes.description: Exploding Keg also causes your next 2 casts of Keg Smash to summon a whirl of flame which spirals outwards, dealing 70 additional Fire damage to each enemy struck.

nodes.name: Empty the Cellar
nodes.description: Exploding Keg can be reactivated within 20 sec to throw 5 additional kegs at nearby targets, each dealing 70 Physical damage and reducing the cooldown of your Brews by 3.0 sec.

nodes.name: Stormstout's Last Keg
nodes.description: Keg Smash deals 50% additional damage to its primary target, has 1 additional charge, and its range is increased by 10 yards.

nodes.name: Heart of the Ox
nodes.description: Mastery increased by 5%. Double this effect while Invoke Niuzao, the Black Ox is active.

nodes.name: Mighty Stomp
nodes.description: While active, Invoke Niuzao, the Black Ox can be recast to cause Niuzao to stomp mightily and knock nearby enemies into the air.

ranks.description: Drinking a Brew has a 20% chance to leave you with an Empty Barrel, which is tossed along with your next Keg Smash to deal 105 Physical damage to your target. Ricochets up to 4 times at 80% effectiveness.

Gaining an Empty Barrel resets the cooldown of Keg Smash and makes its next cast cost 0% less energy. 

Physical damage dealt increased by 10%.

When you cast Fortifying Brew or Celestial Brew you tap a fresh keg, granting yourself and 2 nearby allies a refreshing drink, and leaving you with an Empty Barrel.

Empty Barrels deal 100% increased damage.

 Refreshing Drink:
Upon taking damage, automatically consume a refreshing drink to heal for 1,120 over 8 sec.

nodes.name: Vigilant Watch
nodes.description: Blackout Kick deals an additional 30% critical damage.

choices.name: Whirling Steel
choices.description:
When your health drops below 50%, summon Whirling Steel, increasing your parry chance and avoidance by 15% for 6 sec.

This effect can not occur more than once every 180 sec.

choices.name: Predictive Training
choices.description: When you dodge or parry an attack, reduce all damage taken by 10% for the next 6 sec.

nodes.name: Martial Precision
nodes.description: Your attacks penetrate 12% armor.

choices.name: Pride of Pandaria
choices.description: Flurry Strikes have 15% additional chance to critically strike.

choices.name: High Impact
choices.description: Enemies who die within 10 sec of being damaged by a Flurry Strike explode, dealing 35 physical damage to uncontrolled enemies within 8 yds.

nodes.name: Flurry Strikes
nodes.description: Your auto attacks have a chance to generate 1-2 Flurry Charges. When you cast Keg Smash, unleash all Flurry Charges, dealing 21 Physical damage per charge.

nodes.name: Veteran's Eye
nodes.description: Haste increased by 5%.

nodes.name: One Versus Many
nodes.description:
Auto attack critical strikes generate double the amount of Flurry Charges.


Keg Smash damage increased by 35%.

nodes.name: Efficient Training
nodes.description:
Energy spenders deal an additional 20% damage.
The cooldown of Invoke Niuzao, the Black Ox is reduced by 25 sec.

nodes.name: Wisdom of the Wall
nodes.description: Invoke Niuzao, the Black Ox causes Breath of Fire to launch 3 Flurry Strikes.

nodes.name: Against All Odds
nodes.description: Your agility is increased by 4%.

choices.name: Combat Stance
choices.description: The cooldown of Roll is decreased by 10%.

choices.name: Initiator's Edge
choices.description: Movement speed is increased by 50% for the first 8 sec of combat.

nodes.name: Shado Over the Battlefield
nodes.description: Flurry Strikes deal 18 Nature damage to all enemies within 6 yds, reduced beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Stand Ready
nodes.description: Activating Invoke Niuzao, the Black Ox instantly grants 10 stacks of Flurry Strikes that trigger on your next attack at 70% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Weapons of the Wall
nodes.description: Invoke Niuzao, the Black Ox's stomp damage increased by 20%.

nodes.name: Overwhelming Force
nodes.description: Rising Sun Kick, Blackout Kick and Tiger Palm deal 15% additional damage to enemies in a line in front of you. Damage reduced above 5 targets.

choices.name: Tiger's Vigor
choices.description: Casting Tiger's Lust reduces the remaining cooldown on Roll by 5 sec.

choices.name: Roar from the Heavens
choices.description: Tiger's Lust grants 20% movement speed to up to 2 allies near its target.

nodes.name: Manifestation
nodes.description: Chi Burst and Chi Wave deal 50% increased damage and healing.

nodes.name: Aspect of Harmony
nodes.description:
Store vitality from 10% of your damage dealt and 30% of your healing.

For 10 sec after casting Thunder Focus Tea your spells and abilities draw upon the stored vitality to deal 40% additional healing over 8 sec.

choices.name: Purified Spirit
choices.description: When Aspect of Harmony ends, any remaining vitality is expelled as healing over 8 sec, split among nearby targets.

choices.name: Harmonic Gambit
choices.description: During Aspect of Harmony, Rising Sun Kick, Blackout Kick, and Tiger Palm also withdraw vitality to damage enemies for an additional 20% over 8 sec.

nodes.name: Endless Draught
nodes.description: Thunder Focus Tea has 1 additional charge.

choices.name: Path of Resurgence
choices.description: Chi Burst increases vitality stored by 25% for 10 sec.

choices.name: Way of a Thousand Strikes
choices.description: Rising Sun Kick, Blackout Kick and Tiger Palm contribute 30% additional vitality.

nodes.name: Coalescence
nodes.description:
When Aspect of Harmony heals, it has a chance to spread to a nearby ally. When you directly heal an affected target, it has a chance to intensify, withdrawing additional vitality to increase its effect by up to 20%.

Vivify no longer contributes vitality. While Aspect of Harmony is not active, Vivify instead draws on available vitality to deal an additional 100% healing over 8 sec.

Vitality stored by other abilities is increased by 50%.

nodes.name: Clarity of Purpose
nodes.description: Casting Enveloping Mist stores 1,140 additional vitality.

choices.name: Mantra of Purity
choices.description: When cast on yourself, your single-target healing spells heal for 10% more and restore an additional 570 health over 6 sec.

choices.name: Mantra of Tenacity
choices.description: Fortifying Brew grants 20% Stagger.

nodes.name: Balanced Stratagem
nodes.description: Casting a Physical spell or ability increases the damage and healing of your next Fire or Nature spell or ability by 3%, and vice versa. Stacks up to 5.

nodes.name: Harmonic Surge
nodes.description:
Casting Thunder Focus Tea grants 2 charges of Potential Energy. Your next cast of Tiger Palm or Vivify consumes all charges of Potential Energy to cause a Harmonic Surge.

Harmonic Surge:
For each charge of Potential Energy, deal 836 Nature damage to your target and 836 Nature damage to other nearby enemies, and heal up to 5 allies for 190. Damage reduced above 5 targets.

nodes.name: Potential Energy
nodes.description: Casting Keg Smash grants a charge of Potential Energy.

nodes.name: Meditative Focus
nodes.description:
Blackout Combo:
Increases Tiger Palm damage by an additional 50% and Keg Smash reduces the cooldown on your Brews by an additional 1.0 sec.

  Press the Advantage:
Nature damage dealt by your main hand auto-attacks is increased by 100% and they now reduce the cooldown on your Brews by an additional 0.25 sec.

mistweaver.description: A healer who masters the mysterious art of manipulating life energies aided by the wisdom of the Jade Serpent. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Mace, Sword

nodes.description: Touch of Death can now be used on targets with less than 15% health remaining, dealing 35% of your maximum health in damage.

nodes.name: Mist Caller
nodes.description: Vivify and Sheilun's Gift trigger a Gust of Mist on yourself.
